disclaimer: Halal certification rules and accredited body lists change. Verify with MOIAT directly before quoting figures.

authority.name: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology
authority.absorbed: ESMA (Emirates Authority for Standardization and Metrology) was absorbed into MOIAT in 2020. The halal scheme moved with it.
authority.warning: ESMA is no longer an active authority. Do not refer founders to ESMA for halal certification.

halal_mark.name: UAE Halal Mark
halal_mark.notes: Single UAE Halal Mark used across all halal-certified products. Issued by MOIAT-accredited bodies.

certification_bodies.api_status: No public API. HTML directory only. No product-level lookup.

hcb_registration.notes: Fees for Halal Certification Bodies registering with MOIAT.

recommended_approach: Curated reference data plus a scheduled scrape of the HCB directory. No real-time API exists. Do not promise product-level certification lookup.
